 assert(r_int - shares_int * min_s_int == r_int % min_s_int) by(nonlinear_arith) requires min_s_int > 0, r_int == shares_int * min_s_int + r_int % min_s_int;  assert(outcome(r_int, si, bj, kk_int) == r_int + kk_int * (bj - si)) by(nonlinear_arith); } } }
